creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sun, 02 Feb 2014 14:42:41 -0600 Bryan Drewery wrote:
> exp-run started. Will have results tomorrow.

I assume the results can be found at:
http://package20.nyi.freebsd.org/bulk/91amd64-default-pr_185372/2014-02-02_20h47m22s/

I've uploaded a new patch that fixes all the issues there that are caused
by the previous patch.

Same location: http://people.freebsd.org/~tijl/fortran.patch
(patch against r342615)

You should also do an exp-run on FreeBSD 10 because the patch changes
the compiler from gcc46 to cc (=clang) and g++46/libstdc++ to c++/libc++.
